column1: Like the previous games, Pokémon Black & White have dozens of Technical Machines and Hidden Machines for you to use. However, unlike past games, the TMs of Unova do not disappear after use and can be used time and time again at no extra cost. This means that all of the TMs can only be found once within the game which can make some of them very hard to find..
